description: OCI Truth: scripts listed here are not held to full PR-9I/PR-9K fleet CI until sunset; each row must include replacementPlan. Do not expand this list without platform review.

entries.reason: Legacy sample script: mixes granular results into ACK payload (payload.results), uses gclid||wbraid||gbraid for click id instead of PR-9I single-column selection, and does not match dispatch-pending ACK contract.
entries.replacementPlan: Remove from fleet or rewrite on GoogleAdsScriptProduction.js / site-specific SSOT; tracked as tech debt — no new deployments.

entries.reason: Site-specific legacy: ACK path embeds payload.results; click-id selection uses gclid||wbraid||gbraid; not aligned with universal single-column CSV + dispatch-only ACK semantics.
entries.replacementPlan: Port Muratcan deploy to GoogleAdsScriptKocOtoKurtarma.js pattern (PR-9I + PR-9K) or Production template; verify in Ads UI before dropping quarantine.

entries.reason: Site-specific legacy: payload.results in ACK; combined click-id expression; lacks verified dispatch-pending ACK flags in sendAck path.
entries.replacementPlan: Rebuild from GoogleAdsScriptProduction.js + PR-9K Koç reference implementation; sunset quarantine entry after green canary.
